title: Hiring Production Engineer at Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd!
